gitCommit.subject: fix(auth): restore supabase.rpc .bind(supabase) — kills 3 boot TypeError crashes
gitCommit.body:
fix(auth): restore supabase.rpc .bind(supabase) — kills 3 boot TypeError crashes

ROOT CAUSE (introduced in AUTH-HYDRATION-FIX v2.1 today):
  supabase.rpc extracted as variable WITHOUT .bind() → `this` = undefined
  SupabaseClient.prototype.rpc() does `return this.rest.rpc(...)` internally
  With this=undefined (ES modules strict mode) → synchronous throw:
    TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'rest')

CASCADE:
  Sync throw → doFetch() fails in <1ms → dedup clears instantly
  Supabase fires INITIAL_SESSION twice (localStorage + network verify)
  2nd call NOT deduped → 2 errors. Retry (+500ms) → 3rd error.

FIX (1 word changed):
  - supabase.rpc as unknown as RPCCallerFn
  + supabase.rpc.bind(supabase) as unknown as RPCCallerFn

v2.1 → v2.2
